title: Error with embedding monday board on MS SharePoint
excerpt: I got the iframe code to embed my board into MS SharePoint, however, the board randomly expands even when I click “Collapse All Groups”.   Anyone else experience this or know how to fix this?

posts.author: rpezer (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: I got the iframe code to embed my board into MS SharePoint, however, the board randomly expands even when I click “Collapse All Groups”. Anyone else experience this or know how to fix this?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @rpezer

That sounds quite odd! Are you trying to embed an i-frame of your custom built app, or are you trying to embed a board view via the share board views publicly feature? If it’s the latter, I would recommend reaching out to us at support@monday.com so that we can troubleshoot and investigate the issue in closer detail and avoid sharing sensitive information on a forum I hope that makes sense.

-Alex

posts.author: rpezer (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Got it. Thank you, Alex. I just emailed support.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
